steps.title: State the finding only
steps.content: The audience already understands seedling emergence, so the sentence should not define it. The goal is to present Morales and Chen's finding: in the stated grassland and climate conditions, plant litter had a positive effect on seedling emergence.

steps.title: Avoid extra definitions
steps.content: A gives only the publication year. B states the finding but wastes space defining seedling emergence for an already familiar audience. C gives a vague topic and an added definition of plant litter without the actual finding. The best choice states the finding and conditions directly. The answer is D.
